block_info.label: GEMM
block_info.description: Matrix Multiplication block targeted for AI Engines.

parameters.name: AIE_VARIANT
parameters.description: Specifies the device type: 1-AIE, 2-AIE-ML, 22-AIE-ML-V2
parameters.label: AIE Variant:

parameters.name: data_type_A
parameters.description: describes the data type of samples in input matrix A
parameters.label: A input data type:

parameters.name: data_type_B
parameters.description: describes the data type of samples in input matrix B
parameters.label: B input data type:

parameters.name: data_type_out
parameters.description: describes the type of data samples in the output matrix.
parameters.label: Output data type:

parameters.name: Dim_A
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of elements along the unique dimension (rows) of Matrix A.
parameters.label: Rows in input A:

parameters.name: Dim_B
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of elements along the unique dimension (columns) of Matrix B.
parameters.label: Columns in input B:

parameters.name: Dim_AB
parameters.description: is an unsigned integer which describes the number of elements along the unique dimension (A'columns & B'rows) of Matrix B.
parameters.label: Columns in input A, Rows in input B:

parameters.name: ssr
parameters.description: describes the number of kernels (or cascaded kernel chains) that will compute the matrix multiplication in parallel.
parameters.label: SSR:

parameters.name: casc_length
parameters.description: describes the number of AIE kernels the matrix multiplication will be divided into in series.
parameters.label: Number of cascade stages:

parameters.name: InputWindowSizeA
parameters.description: describes the number of samples in the window API used for input to Matrix A.
parameters.label: Number of samples in input A:

parameters.name: InputWindowSizeB
parameters.description: describes the number of samples in the window API used for input to Matrix B.
parameters.label: Number of samples in input B:

parameters.name: A_Leading_data
parameters.description: describes whether input matrix A is row-major or column-major
parameters.label: A input leading dimension:

parameters.name: B_Leading_data
parameters.description: describes whether input matrix B is row-major or column-major
parameters.label: B input leading dimension:

parameters.name: Output_Leading_data
parameters.description: describes whether output matrix is row-major or column-major
parameters.label: Output leading dimension:

parameters.name: A_Tiling_data
parameters.description: describes whether or not to add an additional kernel to rearrange the matrix samples into their required position.
parameters.label: Add tiling to input A

parameters.name: B_Tiling_data
parameters.description: describes wether or not to add an additional kernel to rearrange the matrix samples into their required position.
parameters.label: Add tiling to input B

parameters.name: Output_Detiling_data
parameters.description: describes wether or not to add an additional kernel to rearrange the matrix samples into their required position.
parameters.label: Add detiling to output

parameters.name: shift_output
parameters.description: describes power of 2 shift down applied to the accumulation of product terms before each output.
parameters.label: Scale output down by 2^:

parameters.name: rnd_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Rounding mode:

parameters.name: sat_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Saturation mode:
